name: trainheroic-coach-mcp
description: Manage a TrainHeroic coaching account from Claude: athletes, teams, programs, workouts, exercises, and messaging.
long_description: An unofficial local MCP server for TrainHeroic coaches. It runs entirely on your machine: your TrainHeroic credentials are stored in the OS keychain and sent only to TrainHeroic, never to the connecting app or any third-party host. Tools cover coach reads (athletes, teams, programs, analytics), exercise resolve/search/create, the workout draft/publish lifecycle, and live messaging. Athlete-facing and destructive actions (publishing a session, sending or deleting a message, removing a session) require confirmation.

email.title: TrainHeroic email
email.description: The email for your TrainHeroic coach account. Sent only to TrainHeroic.

password.title: TrainHeroic password
password.description: Your TrainHeroic password. Stored in your OS keychain and sent only to TrainHeroic, never to the connecting app.
